hero.headline: I create modern websites and powerful custom scripts that save you time and money
hero.subheadline: Freelance web developer & automation specialist. 5+ years of experience. 40+ successful projects.

about.title: About Me
about.p1: Hi! I'm a fullstack developer focused on <highlight>speed, results and clean code</highlight>.
about.p2: I am a passionate freelance developer specializing in building fast, beautiful websites and smart automation scripts. My goal is to help businesses save time and grow through technology.
about.p3: I work with clients from Europe, the US, and across the CIS. I always meet deadlines and explain every step in plain language.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Not just 'done' — every project solved a real business problem.
projects.p1_desc: Online store with catalog, cart, payments and user dashboard.
projects.p1_problem: The client was running an outdated CMS that was killing sales. Page load time exceeded 8 seconds.
projects.p1_solution: Next.js App Router with server-side rendering, optimised PostgreSQL queries, Stripe for payments.
projects.p1_result: Load time dropped to 1.2s. Conversion rose from 1.4% to 2.1%. Project ROI reached in 3 months.
projects.p2_desc: Bot for automated order processing, notifications and CRM integration.
projects.p2_problem: Managers were manually copying orders from Telegram into spreadsheets — 18+ hours per week.
projects.p2_solution: Python bot with aiogram 3.x, automatic order parsing, Google Sheets sync and internal CRM integration.
projects.p2_result: Full order intake automation. Zero data-entry errors. Savings: 18 hrs/week ≈ €800/month.
projects.p3_desc: Web application for real-time business metrics visualisation.
projects.p3_problem: The team relied on stale Excel reports. Decisions were delayed by a full day.
projects.p3_solution: FastAPI + WebSocket for real-time data streaming, React with custom charts, Redis caching.
projects.p3_result: Dashboard refreshes every 5 seconds. Decision time cut from 24 hours to 5 minutes.
projects.p4_desc: Automated competitor price collection from 5 platforms with analytics.
projects.p4_problem: Managers manually monitored prices on Wildberries, Ozon, Yandex Market every single day.
projects.p4_solution: Async Python scraper with proxy rotation + FastAPI endpoints for 1C integration.
projects.p4_result: 50,000+ SKUs scraped in 15 minutes. Automatic alert on any competitor price change.
projects.p5_desc: High-converting B2B website with animations and lead-capture form.
projects.p5_problem: The old site generated 1–2 enquiries per week. The client wanted 10+.
projects.p5_solution: Restructured flow following the AIDA model, animated sections, A/B tested CTA buttons.
projects.p5_result: 12–15 enquiries per week. Time-on-site up from 40s to 2.5 min. Google PageSpeed: 97.
projects.p6_desc: Autonomous copy-trading bot for a prediction market platform.
projects.p6_problem: Manual monitoring of top traders required constant online presence.
projects.p6_solution: Python bot with FastAPI + HTMX dashboard, automatic trade mirroring, safety filters.
projects.p6_result: Fully autonomous 24/7 operation. Real-time metrics dashboard. Docker deploy in 5 minutes.

process.title: How I Work
process.subtitle: No fluff, no 'we'll figure it out'. Transparent process from brief to launch.
process.s1_desc: I dive into your task, audience and competitors. I ask the uncomfortable questions — to get it right, not just pretty.
process.s2_desc: Structure, UX wireframe, architecture. We align before a single line of code is written — to avoid costly rework.
process.s3_desc: Clean code, component architecture, CI/CD. A working demo in your browser every 3–5 days.
process.s4_desc: Cross-browser, mobile, load testing. PageSpeed > 90 before handoff.
process.s5_desc: Deployed to your server or Vercel. 30 days of free post-launch support included.

testimonials.title: Testimonials
testimonials.t1_text: Ordered an online store. Delivered on time, no fuss. Conversion went up — I've already recommended him to two partners.
testimonials.t2_text: He automated our Telegram order processing. Now our managers don't spend time on routine — they just sell.
testimonials.t3_text: The analytics dashboard transformed how we make decisions. We see live data and react in real time.

contact.title: Let's Talk
contact.subtitle: Tell me about your project — I'll respond within a few hours and suggest the best approach.
contact.field_message_placeholder: I need a website / automation / scraper...
contact.success_text: I'll get back to you within a few hours. Keep your phone close :)

footer.status: © {year} · Fullstack Developer · Open for new projects
footer.built: Built with Next.js · Framer Motion · TypeScript
